findings.description: Reason explicitly admits combining vendor master modification with payment activity — a SoD-dangerous combination that should never be documented as intentional in a firefighter session.

findings.description: Segregation of Duties (SoD) violation: vendor master maintenance and payment execution combined in one session. This allows a single person to change vendor bank details and immediately trigger a payment to the new account.
Direct modification of vendor bank data (table LFBK, field BANKN). This is a critical fraud-risk change: altering bank account details can redirect payments. Must be approved by AP management.
